sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt8, value Float32, flags Array(UInt8), timestamp DateTime DEFAULT now());

WITH cos(value) AS cosine_value SELECT id, cosine_value, arrayJoin(flags) AS expanded_flags FROM test_table WHERE cosine_value GLOBAL IN (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value < -0.5) ORDER BY timestamp;
SELECT id, count(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT id, cos(value) AS cosine_value FROM test_table GROUP BY id, cosine_value HAVING cnt > 0) WHERE cosine_value GLOBAL IN (1.0, 0.5, -1.0);
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, cos(value) AS cos_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO temp_table SELECT id, cos(0.0), flags FROM (SELECT id, flags FROM test_table WHERE flags IS NOT NULL) AS temp WHERE cos(value) GLOBAL IN (SELECT cos(min(value)) FROM test_table);
SELECT cos(x) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value AS x FROM test_table) WHERE x GLOBAL IN (SELECT max(cos(value)) FROM temp_table);
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN description String DEFAULT 'default';
SELECT description, cos(value) AS cosine_value FROM test_table ORDER BY cosine_value DESC;
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE id GLOBAL IN (SELECT id FROM temp_table WHERE cos_value IS NULL);
